{{CargoRelic
|name=Laborer Medal
|class_id=20488
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The glorious Laborer Medal was designed to commend builders who made outstanding contributions to a better society. It is due to their hard work that everyone could enjoy a better life, and it was right to commend their effort!
|fame=31
|art=14
|fth=15
|civ=14
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail ATK +20<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +1<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +2<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss3=Snail ATK +60<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +3<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss4=Snail ATK +60<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +3<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss7=Snail ATK +60<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +3<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200<br> (Awakened)
}}
